A2: Unfortunately, no. This charger is designed for the US 110V market only, which means it won't work in other countries with different voltage requirements. This is in contrast to previous Kindle chargers that were universal.

A4: According to the reviews, yes, but it's not recommended. A charger with a higher amp rating will not harm the device, but it may extend charge times.

A5: Based on the reviews, it's likely that the charger will work with your Kindle, as the power requirements for most Kindle models are similar (5V, 1 amp). However, it's always a good idea to double-check the specifications before making a purchase.
